info.name: Cosmic-Tech Therapy API v3 (Refactored Onboarding)
info.description:
Complete API for Therapy Booking Platform - Doctor Onboarding with profile_status state machine, Authentication, Appointments, and Admin Management

**Base URL:** {{baseUrl}}
**Version:** 3.0.0
**Updated:** 2026-06-16
**Schema:** Profile Status State Machine (draft submitted approved payout_pending active)
**Migration:** see backend/db/migrations/001_refactor_doctor_onboarding.sql

exec: pm.test('Has route for frontend redirect', () => pm.expect(d.data.route || '/onboarding/basic-info').to.be.a('string'));

formdata.value: 8+ years of clinical experience specializing in cognitive behavioral therapy

body.raw:
